shadowSentences: I love reading books in the evening.
My favorite hobby is painting landscapes.
Traveling to new countries is exciting for me.
I enjoy cooking different cuisines on weekends.
Listening to music helps me relax after work.
I often visit art galleries to see new exhibits.
Gardening has become a rewarding part of my life.
I prefer spending time outdoors rather than indoors.
Volunteering at local shelters has taught me a lot.
Maintaining a healthy lifestyle requires daily effort and commitment.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about eating habits.
questions: Q1: What is your typical daily diet like?
Q2: Have you ever faced challenges in maintaining healthy eating?
Q3: How important do you think a balanced diet is for overall health?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone trying to eat healthier?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you describe your most memorable travel experience?
Q2: What difficulties have you encountered while traveling?
Q3: How do you feel travel impacts a person's perspective?
Q4: What tips would you offer for someone traveling for the first time?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What type of exercise do you enjoy the most?
Q2: Have you ever struggled to maintain a regular exercise routine?
Q3: Why do you think physical activity is important?
Q4: What recommendations would you give for staying motivated to exercise?
